## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Please also include relevant motivation and context. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] This change requires a documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce. Please also list any relevant details for your test configuration.

- [ ] **Frontend tests:** Run `pnpm test` inside the `/extension` directory and list any specific test files added/modified.
- [ ] **TypeScript verification:** Run `pnpm compile` inside the `/extension` directory.
- [ ] **Manual verification:** Detail how you manually tested the functionality (e.g., loaded extension, tested saving specific page, verified MCP response).

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style and standards of this project (e.g., DRY, YAGNI, SOLID).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (including `docs/spec.md` and `AGENTS.md` if the repository structure, tech stack, or build/dev scripts have changed).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes.
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules.
